```{r}
#| warning: false
#| code-fold: true
#| include: false

subfoldername <- "../../outputs"


# Format system time for filenames
format_time <- function(time) {
  format(time, "%b_%d_%Y_%X") %>%
    gsub(" ", "_", .) %>%
    gsub(":", "_", .) %>%
    gsub("-", "_", .)
}

# Generate CSV filename
mkfilefn <- function(input_df,
                     filename,
                     wheretosave = getwd(),
                     site_column = NULL,
                     minyear = NULL,
                     maxyear = NULL,
                     time = FALSE) {
  name <- filename
  if (!is.null(site_column))
    name <- paste(name, paste(length(unique(input_df[[site_column]])), "sites", sep = ""), sep = "_")
  if (!is.null(minyear) &&
      !is.null(maxyear))
    name <- paste(name, minyear, maxyear, sep = "_")
  if (time)
    name <- paste(name, format_time(Sys.time()), sep = "_")
  paste(wheretosave, "/", name, ".csv", sep = "")
}

# Generate metadata filename
mkmetafilefn <- function(input_df,
                         filename,
                         wheretosave = getwd(),
                         site_column = NULL,
                         minyear = NULL,
                         maxyear = NULL,
                         time = FALSE) {
  name <- filename
  if (!is.null(site_column))
    name <- paste(name, paste(length(unique(input_df[[site_column]])), "sites", sep = ""), sep = "_")
  if (!is.null(minyear) &&
      !is.null(maxyear))
    name <- paste(name, minyear, maxyear, sep = "_")
  if (time)
    name <- paste(name, format_time(Sys.time()), sep = "_")
  paste(wheretosave, "/", name, ".txt", sep = "")
}

# Summarize dataframe columns and unique values
summarize_data_frame <- function(df,
                                 dfdesc,
                                 desc,
                                 filename,
                                 site_column = NULL,
                                 minyear = NULL,
                                 maxyear = NULL,
                                 time = FALSE) {
  summary_text <- c("###############################")
  name <- filename
  if (!is.null(site_column))
    name <- paste(name, paste(length(unique(df[[site_column]])), "sites", sep = ""), sep = "_")
  if (!is.null(minyear) &&
      !is.null(maxyear))
    name <- paste(name, minyear, maxyear, sep = "_")
  if (time)
    name <- paste(name, format_time(Sys.time()), sep = "_")
  name <- paste(name, ".csv", sep = "")
  
  summary_text <- c(
    summary_text,
    paste("filename:", name),
    paste("date:", Sys.time()),
    paste("description:", dfdesc),
    "###############################",
    "",
    "column names:",
    paste(names(df), collapse = " ")
  )
  
  for (column_name in names(df)) {
    summary_text <- c(
      summary_text,
      paste("\ncolumn:", column_name),
      paste("description:", desc$description[which(desc$column_names == column_name)]),
      paste("Data Type:", class(df[[column_name]]))
    )
    
    if (is.numeric(df[[column_name]])) {
      summary_text <- c(summary_text,
                        paste("Mean:", mean(df[[column_name]], na.rm = TRUE)),
                        paste("Min:", min(df[[column_name]], na.rm = TRUE)),
                        paste("Max:", max(df[[column_name]], na.rm = TRUE)))
    } else if (inherits(df[[column_name]], "Date")) {
      summary_text <- c(summary_text, paste(
        "Date Range:",
        min(df[[column_name]], na.rm = TRUE),
        "to",
        max(df[[column_name]], na.rm = TRUE)
      ))
    } else {
      unique_values <- unique(df[[column_name]])
      n_unique <- length(unique_values)
      value_counts <- table(df[[column_name]])
      has_duplicates <- any(value_counts > 1)
      
      if (n_unique > 100) {
        if (has_duplicates) {
          freq_values <- names(sort(value_counts, decreasing = TRUE)[1:10])
          summary_text <- c(
            summary_text,
            paste(
              "Unique Values: (showing 10 most frequent of",
              n_unique,
              "entries)"
            )
          )
          for (value in freq_values)
            summary_text <- c(summary_text, paste("  ", value))
        } else {
          example_values <- sample(unique_values, 10)
          summary_text <- c(
            summary_text,
            paste(
              "Unique Values: (showing 10 examples of",
              n_unique,
              "entries)"
            )
          )
          for (value in example_values)
            summary_text <- c(summary_text, paste("  ", value))
        }
      } else {
        summary_text <- c(summary_text,
                          paste("Unique Values: (showing all", n_unique, "entries)"))
        for (value in unique_values)
          summary_text <- c(summary_text, paste("  ", value))
      }
    }
  }
  
  summary_text
}

# Main function to save CSV and generate metadata
save_csv_and_metadata <- function(input_df,
                                  df_desc,
                                  column_descriptions,
                                  filename,
                                  wheretosave = getwd(),
                                  minyear = NULL,
                                  maxyear = NULL,
                                  site_column = NULL,
                                  time = FALSE) {
  csv_filename <- mkfilefn(input_df,
                           filename,
                           wheretosave,
                           site_column,
                           minyear,
                           maxyear,
                           time)
  metadata_filename <- mkmetafilefn(input_df,
                                    filename,
                                    wheretosave,
                                    site_column,
                                    minyear,
                                    maxyear,
                                    time)
  
  write.csv(input_df, csv_filename, row.names = FALSE)
  
  input_df_desc_full <- data.frame(column_names = names(input_df), description = column_descriptions)
  summary_text <- summarize_data_frame(
    input_df,
    df_desc,
    input_df_desc_full,
    filename,
    site_column,
    minyear,
    maxyear,
    time
  )
  
  file_conn <- file(metadata_filename, "w")
  writeLines(summary_text, file_conn)
  close(file_conn)
  
  list(csv_filename = csv_filename, metadata_filename = metadata_filename)
}


#usage eg
  # # Prevalence data
  # output_files_prevalence <- save_csv_and_metadata(
  #   input_df = condition_list[[category]]$prevalence_summary,
  #   df_desc = paste(
  #     category,
  #     "condition prevalences recorded from TCRMP coral health surveys"
  #   ),
  #   column_descriptions = c(
  #     "TCRMP site",
  #     "survey year",
  #     "sample year",
  #     "Date the sample was taken",
  #     "replicate / transect",
  #     "Sample period",
  #     "number of colonies",
  #     paste("prevalence of", unlist(lapply(
  #       gsub("prev_", "", colnames(condition_list[[category]]$prevalence_summary)[8:ncol(condition_list[[category]]$prevalence_summary)]), process_coltomeaning
  #     )), "(%)")
  #   ),
  #   filename = paste(section, "_coralcondition_", tolower(category), "prevalence", sep = ""),
  #   wheretosave = subfoldername,
  #   minyear = as.character(min(condition_list[[category]]$prevalence_summary$year)),
  #   maxyear = as.character(max(condition_list[[category]]$prevalence_summary$year)),
  #   site_column = "site",
  #   time = FALSE
  # )
  

# Function to generate download links
generate_download_links <- function(output_files) {
  csv_download_link <- paste0(
    "{{< downloadthis `r '",
    output_files$csv_filename,
    "'` dname='",
    gsub("/", "", gsub(subfoldername, '', output_files$csv_filename)),
    "' label='download ",
    gsub("/", "", (gsub(subfoldername, '', output_files$csv_filename))),
    "' >}}"
  )

  metadata_download_link <- paste0(
    "{{< downloadthis `r '",
    output_files$metadata_filename,
    "'` dname='",
    gsub("/", "", gsub(subfoldername, '', output_files$metadata_filename)),
    "' label='download metadata' >}}"
  )

  list(csv_link = csv_download_link, metadata_link = metadata_download_link)
}

#usage eg
  # prevalence_links <- generate_download_links(output_files_prevalence)
  # cat(prevalence_links$csv_link, "\n\n")
  # cat(prevalence_links$metadata_link, "\n\n")
```
